ggsunburstR 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

ggsunburstR

Source: CLAUDE.md

Project Overview

ggsunburstR is an R package for creating sunburst charts using ggplot2.

This project is in early development — the package structure has not yet been created.

Development Setup

  • This is an R package project. Use devtools for development workflows.
  • Follow Tidyverse coding style and conventions.

Common Commands

devtools::load_all()      # Load package for interactive use
devtools::test()          # Run tests
devtools::check()         # R CMD check
devtools::document()      # Generate documentation from roxygen2
pkgdown::build_site()     # Build documentation site

Code Style

  • Follow the Tidyverse style guide.
  • Use roxygen2 for documentation.
  • Use testthat (edition 3) for tests.
  • Pipe operator: use |> (base R pipe).

Git Conventions

  • Branch: main
  • Commit messages: use conventional commits (e.g., feat:, fix:, docs:, test:).

On this page
